fields.description: Number of days of sales history used to calculate the average daily selling rate.
fields.label: Demand History Window (Days)

fields.description: Default safety buffer days per item (overridable per item/category).
fields.label: Default Safety Days

fields.description: Average internal transfer lead time in days (Warehouse to Store or Store to Store). Used for internal replenishment.
fields.label: Internal In-Transit Lead Time (Days)

fields.description: Minimum days of cover a donor store must retain after any transfer.
fields.label: Donor Protection Days

fields.description: The central warehouse that is checked first for all replenishment requests.
fields.label: Central Warehouse

fields.description: Automatically generate Material Forecast documents on schedule.
fields.label: Auto Create Forecast

fields.description: Number of items processed per database batch. Higher = faster but more memory.
fields.label: Batch Size (Items per Worker)

fields.description: Number of parallel background workers for forecast calculation.
fields.label: Parallel Workers

fields.description: Cache item master data in Redis for duration of forecast run.
fields.label: Enable Redis Cache
